arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa’s father comments on Liverpool player’s future
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa may not have had the easiest time at Liverpool this season, but his father, Enrico Chiesa, insists the forward is happy at the club and eager to prove himself. arts.ttl: Germany vs Italy – Nations League Combined XI
arts.sum: Germany and Italy do battle this evening in the quarter-finals of the UEFA Nations League. arts.ttl: Nagelsmann confirms ter Stegen is still seen as Germany's first-choice goalkeeper
arts.sum: Julian Nagelsmann has made it clear that long-term injured Marc-André ter Stegen will be Germany's number one at the World Cup if he's fit to play.
